queries.question: Show music festivals and film festivals with 60000 attendees.
queries.sql:
SELECT Festivals.Name 
FROM Festivals JOIN Events ON Festivals.id = Events.FestivalID
WHERE (Festivals.Cultural_Festival = "Music Festival" OR Festivals.Cultural_Festival = "Film Festival") AND Events.Attendance = 60000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?events p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
  ?festivals p:name ?name .
  ?festivals p:Cultural_Festival ?cultural_festival_w .
  ?festivals p:Cultural_Festival ?cultural_festival_w2 .
  ?events p:Attendance ?attendance_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?cultural_festival_w) = "Music Festival" || STR(?cultural_festival_w2) = "Film Festival")) && (STR(?attendance_w) = "60000" || STR(?attendance_w) = "60000.0")))
}
